subcodes.first_line: O ye two cherished companions! Praise be to God, ye are attracted to the manifest Light and are refreshed from the fountain of certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار نازنین الحمد لله یار دلنشین و منجذب نور مبینید و سیراب از عین یقینید
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
